verdict.reason: Two issues: (1) WorkItemId and SessionIdentity are constructed then immediately discarded via .to_string() — the MCP boundary String fields make this unavoidable; use raw strings with explicit comment explaining the boundary constraint, rather than construct-then-discard theatre. (2) assert_eq!(action_type, "gate_review") in the test body is a second behavioral assertion; move it into the helper as a panic guard with a clear message, leaving only the model assertion in the test body.
